point_reviews.reason: The document states COVID-19 is caused by SARS-CoV-2 and became a pandemic in 2020 [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00000].
The document confirms that the virus spreads mainly through close contact and droplets [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00024].
The document mentions that many people experience mild illness or no symptoms, especially older adults [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00133].
The document states that COVID-19 can lead to serious complications, including acute respiratory distress syndrome [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00131].
The document supports that it's possible to get COVID-19 more than once due to mutations [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00024].
